title: Ophrys akcakarae
taxonomy: Ophrys akcakarae is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Ophrys. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Within the genus Ophrys, it is a member of the subgenus Ophrys, which includes several species of bee orchids. The species Ophrys akcakarae is endemic to Turkey and is typically found in the mountainous regions of the country. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that blooms in the spring with small, fragrant flowers.
